records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. I truly don't know how to repay you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. I truly don't know how to repay you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. I truly don't know how to repay you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If anyone owes gratitude, it's me. So don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If anyone owes gratitude, it's me. So don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If anyone owes gratitude, it's me. So don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to you, I've finally caught a glimpse of the path I should take.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to you, I've finally caught a glimpse of the path I should take.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to you, I've finally caught a glimpse of the path I should take.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad to hear that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad to hear that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad to hear that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you have your own circumstances, so I won't ask for details.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you have your own circumstances, so I won't ask for details.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you have your own circumstances, so I won't ask for details.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kids, come say goodbye properly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kids, come say goodbye properly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kids, come say goodbye properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Next time, can you bring the others too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Next time, can you bring the others too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Next time, can you bring the others too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the Virgo Sword! I really want to see it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the Virgo Sword! I really want to see it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the Virgo Sword! I really want to see it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Children! That's not how you say goodbye. Don't be rude.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Children! That's not how you say goodbye. Don't be rude.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Children! That's not how you say goodbye. Don't be rude.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Miss Knight...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Miss Knight...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Miss Knight...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Emma. You've helped me more than you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Emma. You've helped me more than you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Emma. You've helped me more than you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I just haven't gotten your autograph yet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I just haven't gotten your autograph yet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I just haven't gotten your autograph yet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. Right now, I'm not someone who deserves to stand proudly before you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. Right now, I'm not someone who deserves to stand proudly before you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. Right now, I'm not someone who deserves to stand proudly before you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would it be all right if I gave you that autograph <color=#ffd34c>next time</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would it be all right if I gave you that autograph <color=#ffd34c>next time</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would it be all right if I gave you that autograph <color=#ffd34c>next time</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Next time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Next time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Next time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Oh! Yes, of course!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Oh! Yes, of course!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Oh! Yes, of course!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's definitely meet again, Miss Knight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's definitely meet again, Miss Knight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's definitely meet again, Miss Knight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: See you again, Emma.
records.m_Talk_DEU: See you again, Emma.
records.m_Talk_FRA: See you again, Emma.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, we're here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, we're here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, we're here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like I said before, this is as far as we go. We're just mercs, not an escort service.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like I said before, this is as far as we go. We're just mercs, not an escort service.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like I said before, this is as far as we go. We're just mercs, not an escort service.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The forged pass we used to get past the restricted zone, travel costs, and labor fees...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The forged pass we used to get past the restricted zone, travel costs, and labor fees...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The forged pass we used to get past the restricted zone, travel costs, and labor fees...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Payment's been sent. You can check it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Payment's been sent. You can check it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Payment's been sent. You can check it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got it. Payment confirmed. I guess we're done here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got it. Payment confirmed. I guess we're done here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got it. Payment confirmed. I guess we're done here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But are you sure there's a village out here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But are you sure there's a village out here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But are you sure there's a village out here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hate to say this now, but this area's considered a Corrupted Area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hate to say this now, but this area's considered a Corrupted Area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hate to say this now, but this area's considered a Corrupted Area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you show up later claiming we got the place wrong and ask for a refund, don't bother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you show up later claiming we got the place wrong and ask for a refund, don't bother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you show up later claiming we got the place wrong and ask for a refund, don't bother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. It's not a mistake. It's a bit of a walk, but there's a village tucked away nearby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. It's not a mistake. It's a bit of a walk, but there's a village tucked away nearby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. It's not a mistake. It's a bit of a walk, but there's a village tucked away nearby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah? Well, for the price you paid, I'll take your word for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah? Well, for the price you paid, I'll take your word for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah? Well, for the price you paid, I'll take your word for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That place is my hometown.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That place is my hometown.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That place is my hometown.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As familiar scenery came into view, a forgotten scent of flowers brushed past my nose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As familiar scenery came into view, a forgotten scent of flowers brushed past my nose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As familiar scenery came into view, a forgotten scent of flowers brushed past my nose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the shadow of a towering tree blurred the view of a tiny village shimmering in the distance...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the shadow of a towering tree blurred the view of a tiny village shimmering in the distance...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the shadow of a towering tree blurred the view of a tiny village shimmering in the distance...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw the image of my younger self curled up, lost, and alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw the image of my younger self curled up, lost, and alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw the image of my younger self curled up, lost, and alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A wanderer with no place to return to has no concept of home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A wanderer with no place to return to has no concept of home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A wanderer with no place to return to has no concept of home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But <color=#ffd34c>we</color> called this place our sanctuary...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But <color=#ffd34c>we</color> called this place our sanctuary...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But <color=#ffd34c>we</color> called this place our sanctuary...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because all our beginnings started here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because all our beginnings started here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because all our beginnings started here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's been a theft in the village?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's been a theft in the village?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's been a theft in the village?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. A brother and sister from outside apparently took corn from the fields.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. A brother and sister from outside apparently took corn from the fields.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. A brother and sister from outside apparently took corn from the fields.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Things have been tense lately, so even something small like this has the villagers riled up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Things have been tense lately, so even something small like this has the villagers riled up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Things have been tense lately, so even something small like this has the villagers riled up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. This area's too close to the Corrupted Area for children to wander in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. This area's too close to the Corrupted Area for children to wander in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. This area's too close to the Corrupted Area for children to wander in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure it wasn't a wild animal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure it wasn't a wild animal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure it wasn't a wild animal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what I thought at first, but the boy admitted it himself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what I thought at first, but the boy admitted it himself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what I thought at first, but the boy admitted it himself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The girl ran off, but... this area isn't exactly safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The girl ran off, but... this area isn't exactly safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The girl ran off, but... this area isn't exactly safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you have time, Professor, I'd be grateful if you helped find her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you have time, Professor, I'd be grateful if you helped find her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you have time, Professor, I'd be grateful if you helped find her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hard to believe, honestly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hard to believe, honestly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hard to believe, honestly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But understood, Chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But understood, Chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But understood, Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even after hearing it, I still had my doubts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even after hearing it, I still had my doubts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even after hearing it, I still had my doubts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But here she is. A corn thief, in a place like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But here she is. A corn thief, in a place like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But here she is. A corn thief, in a place like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-eeek!
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-eeek!
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-eeek!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before I address the crime, let me say two things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before I address the crime, let me say two things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before I address the crime, let me say two things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First, that's not a chair. Please stand up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First, that's not a chair. Please stand up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First, that's not a chair. Please stand up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And second, what are you doing here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And second, what are you doing here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And second, what are you doing here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone told me this was a good spot to sit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone told me this was a good spot to sit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone told me this was a good spot to sit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were waiting for sundown, weren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were waiting for sundown, weren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were waiting for sundown, weren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'd be easier to sneak around the village after dark.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'd be easier to sneak around the village after dark.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'd be easier to sneak around the village after dark.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't mean anything bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't mean anything bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't mean anything bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was just... scared to go back to the village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was just... scared to go back to the village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was just... scared to go back to the village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. At least you understand what you did was wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. At least you understand what you did was wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. At least you understand what you did was wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should go back and apologize. Whatever your reasons, stealing is wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You should go back and apologize. Whatever your reasons, stealing is wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You should go back and apologize. Whatever your reasons, stealing is wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the bad ones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the bad ones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the bad ones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I said you're the bad ones. You didn't care how desperate we were.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I said you're the bad ones. You didn't care how desperate we were.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I said you're the bad ones. You didn't care how desperate we were.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All we wanted was to stay in the village a few days. We said we didn't even mind sleeping on the ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All we wanted was to stay in the village a few days. We said we didn't even mind sleeping on the ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All we wanted was to stay in the village a few days. We said we didn't even mind sleeping on the ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you said we smelled. You threw rocks at us. You cursed at us. That's why we stole.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you said we smelled. You threw rocks at us. You cursed at us. That's why we stole.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you said we smelled. You threw rocks at us. You cursed at us. That's why we stole.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Three ears of corn?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Three ears of corn?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Three ears of corn?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two were for my brother and me. The third... was for compensation. My bruise still hasn't gone down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two were for my brother and me. The third... was for compensation. My bruise still hasn't gone down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two were for my brother and me. The third... was for compensation. My bruise still hasn't gone down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard your brother came to apologize.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard your brother came to apologize.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard your brother came to apologize.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then why didn't you go with him?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then why didn't you go with him?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then why didn't you go with him?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I apologize, it means he did something wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I apologize, it means he did something wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I apologize, it means he did something wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But he didn't. He always suffers because I'm a burden.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But he didn't. He always suffers because I'm a burden.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But he didn't. He always suffers because I'm a burden.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe you didn't do anything seriously wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe you didn't do anything seriously wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe you didn't do anything seriously wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But lowering your head isn't shameful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But lowering your head isn't shameful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But lowering your head isn't shameful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It means you can accept your flaws, and it shows you care about others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It means you can accept your flaws, and it shows you care about others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It means you can accept your flaws, and it shows you care about others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what changes if I do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what changes if I do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what changes if I do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you apologize, I'll make sure you get a meal better than three ears of corn.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you apologize, I'll make sure you get a meal better than three ears of corn.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you apologize, I'll make sure you get a meal better than three ears of corn.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How's that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How's that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How's that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Fine. I'll apologize.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Fine. I'll apologize.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Fine. I'll apologize.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wise choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wise choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wise choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then come with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then come with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then come with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-now that I think about it, maybe not...
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-now that I think about it, maybe not...
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-now that I think about it, maybe not...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The longer you delay hard words, the heavier they become.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The longer you delay hard words, the heavier they become.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The longer you delay hard words, the heavier they become.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to blow this up over three ears of corn, I won't stop you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to blow this up over three ears of corn, I won't stop you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to blow this up over three ears of corn, I won't stop you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm sorry. I was wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm sorry. I was wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm sorry. I was wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. Since the child admits it, perhaps we should let it go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. Since the child admits it, perhaps we should let it go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. Since the child admits it, perhaps we should let it go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just a moment, Chief. This isn't something an apology can fix.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just a moment, Chief. This isn't something an apology can fix.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just a moment, Chief. This isn't something an apology can fix.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corrupted Area has been expanding for years. We're short on food and housing as it is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Corrupted Area has been expanding for years. We're short on food and housing as it is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corrupted Area has been expanding for years. We're short on food and housing as it is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to Professor Birmingham, the village is safe, but we can't take chances on outsiders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to Professor Birmingham, the village is safe, but we can't take chances on outsiders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to Professor Birmingham, the village is safe, but we can't take chances on outsiders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I agree. It's unfortunate, but we can't make exceptions to village rules.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I agree. It's unfortunate, but we can't make exceptions to village rules.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I agree. It's unfortunate, but we can't make exceptions to village rules.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They don't even have a guardian who can vouch for them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They don't even have a guardian who can vouch for them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They don't even have a guardian who can vouch for them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are rumors of C.O.s in human form. We can't let sympathy cloud our judgment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are rumors of C.O.s in human form. We can't let sympathy cloud our judgment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are rumors of C.O.s in human form. We can't let sympathy cloud our judgment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-we're not C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-we're not C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-we're not C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My brother and I aren't C.O.s...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My brother and I aren't C.O.s...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My brother and I aren't C.O.s...

records.m_Talk_ENG: May I speak, Chief?
records.m_Talk_DEU: May I speak, Chief?
records.m_Talk_FRA: May I speak, Chief?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Professor Birmingham?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Professor Birmingham?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Professor Birmingham?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If no one objects, I'll take responsibility for this child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If no one objects, I'll take responsibility for this child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If no one objects, I'll take responsibility for this child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You, Professor?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You, Professor?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You, Professor?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I'll take full responsibility if anything happens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I'll take full responsibility if anything happens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I'll take full responsibility if anything happens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'll also make sure nothing does.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'll also make sure nothing does.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'll also make sure nothing does.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... What does everyone else think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... What does everyone else think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... What does everyone else think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the professor says so, maybe they're not so dangerous?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the professor says so, maybe they're not so dangerous?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the professor says so, maybe they're not so dangerous?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. He wouldn't say this lightly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. He wouldn't say this lightly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. He wouldn't say this lightly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-still, even the professor can't prove who these kids are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-still, even the professor can't prove who these kids are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-still, even the professor can't prove who these kids are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't know what they've been through...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't know what they've been through...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't know what they've been through...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The boy admitted his wrongdoing, and the girl came back for his sake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The boy admitted his wrongdoing, and the girl came back for his sake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The boy admitted his wrongdoing, and the girl came back for his sake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're just cornered by life. But their hearts are in the right place. You have nothing to fear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're just cornered by life. But their hearts are in the right place. You have nothing to fear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're just cornered by life. But their hearts are in the right place. You have nothing to fear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. If the Professor's vouching, I won't object.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. If the Professor's vouching, I won't object.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. If the Professor's vouching, I won't object.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Then it's settled. Now
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Then it's settled. Now
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Then it's settled. Now
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. Not yet, Chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. Not yet, Chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. Not yet, Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We haven't heard the child's own answer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We haven't heard the child's own answer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We haven't heard the child's own answer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? M-me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? M-me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? M-me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, this hand I'm offering may feel like hope.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, this hand I'm offering may feel like hope.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, this hand I'm offering may feel like hope.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But let me be clear. If you come with me, you'll face pain in the future.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But let me be clear. If you come with me, you'll face pain in the future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But let me be clear. If you come with me, you'll face pain in the future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, will you take it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, will you take it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, will you take it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's fine. I've already been through plenty of bad things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it's fine. I've already been through plenty of bad things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's fine. I've already been through plenty of bad things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... I'll trust you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... I'll trust you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... I'll trust you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then come with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then come with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then come with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, mister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, mister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, mister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you a good person?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you a good person?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you a good person?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we're judging good and evil, I'm probably closer to evil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we're judging good and evil, I'm probably closer to evil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we're judging good and evil, I'm probably closer to evil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then why are you helping me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then why are you helping me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then why are you helping me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're planning to sell me as a slave, I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're planning to sell me as a slave, I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're planning to sell me as a slave, I'm sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't read, and I'm not smart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't read, and I'm not smart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't read, and I'm not smart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about that. You'll be educated by the Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about that. You'll be educated by the Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about that. You'll be educated by the Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Order?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Order?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Order?

records.m_Talk_ENG: An institution I've worked with for a long time. There, you'll...
records.m_Talk_DEU: An institution I've worked with for a long time. There, you'll...
records.m_Talk_FRA: An institution I've worked with for a long time. There, you'll...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Esther!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Esther!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Esther!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Brother!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Brother!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Brother!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you so much. Chief told me everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you so much. Chief told me everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you so much. Chief told me everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know how to repay this kindness...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know how to repay this kindness...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know how to repay this kindness...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey. The man said we can join the Order!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey. The man said we can join the Order!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey. The man said we can join the Order!

records.m_Talk_ENG: He said we'll get to learn to read too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: He said we'll get to learn to read too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: He said we'll get to learn to read too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Order? Isn't that only for people with family names?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Order? Isn't that only for people with family names?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Order? Isn't that only for people with family names?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're just nameless commoners...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're just nameless commoners...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're just nameless commoners...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Indeed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Indeed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Indeed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But perhaps this too... is fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But perhaps this too... is fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But perhaps this too... is fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about that. Under my sponsorship, you'll be granted a new family name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about that. Under my sponsorship, you'll be granted a new family name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about that. Under my sponsorship, you'll be granted a new family name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll take your name?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll take your name?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll take your name?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not the rightful heir to House Birmingham, so that's not possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not the rightful heir to House Birmingham, so that's not possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not the rightful heir to House Birmingham, so that's not possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This will be a new house. A symbol that you two belong to the same family.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This will be a new house. A symbol that you two belong to the same family.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This will be a new house. A symbol that you two belong to the same family.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Its name... yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Its name... yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Its name... yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let it be <color=#ffd34c>Chevalier</color>. A name that means honorable knight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let it be <color=#ffd34c>Chevalier</color>. A name that means honorable knight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let it be <color=#ffd34c>Chevalier</color>. A name that means honorable knight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I'd never come back after Sir Allen's death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I'd never come back after Sir Allen's death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I'd never come back after Sir Allen's death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... I ended up here again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... I ended up here again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... I ended up here again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm home, everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm home, everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm home, everyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. I truly don't know how to repay you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. I truly don't know how to repay you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. I truly don't know how to repay you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If anyone owes gratitude, it's me. So don't worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If anyone owes gratitude, it's me. So don't worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If anyone owes gratitude, it's me. So don't worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to you, I've finally caught a glimpse of the path I should take.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to you, I've finally caught a glimpse of the path I should take.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to you, I've finally caught a glimpse of the path I should take.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad to hear that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad to hear that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad to hear that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you have your own circumstances, so I won't ask for details.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you have your own circumstances, so I won't ask for details.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you have your own circumstances, so I won't ask for details.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kids, come say goodbye properly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kids, come say goodbye properly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kids, come say goodbye properly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Next time, can you bring the others too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Next time, can you bring the others too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Next time, can you bring the others too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the Virgo Sword! I really want to see it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the Virgo Sword! I really want to see it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the Virgo Sword! I really want to see it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Children! That's not how you say goodbye. Don't be rude.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Children! That's not how you say goodbye. Don't be rude.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Children! That's not how you say goodbye. Don't be rude.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Miss Knight...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Miss Knight...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Miss Knight...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Emma. You've helped me more than you know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Emma. You've helped me more than you know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Emma. You've helped me more than you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I just haven't gotten your autograph yet...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I just haven't gotten your autograph yet...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I just haven't gotten your autograph yet...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. Right now, I'm not someone who deserves to stand proudly before you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. Right now, I'm not someone who deserves to stand proudly before you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. Right now, I'm not someone who deserves to stand proudly before you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would it be all right if I gave you that autograph <color=#ffd34c>next time</color>?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would it be all right if I gave you that autograph <color=#ffd34c>next time</color>?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would it be all right if I gave you that autograph <color=#ffd34c>next time</color>?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Next time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Next time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Next time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Oh! Yes, of course!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Oh! Yes, of course!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Oh! Yes, of course!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's definitely meet again, Miss Knight!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's definitely meet again, Miss Knight!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's definitely meet again, Miss Knight!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: See you again, Emma.
root.m_Talk_DEU: See you again, Emma.
root.m_Talk_FRA: See you again, Emma.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, we're here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, we're here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, we're here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like I said before, this is as far as we go. We're just mercs, not an escort service.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like I said before, this is as far as we go. We're just mercs, not an escort service.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like I said before, this is as far as we go. We're just mercs, not an escort service.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The forged pass we used to get past the restricted zone, travel costs, and labor fees...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The forged pass we used to get past the restricted zone, travel costs, and labor fees...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The forged pass we used to get past the restricted zone, travel costs, and labor fees...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Payment's been sent. You can check it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Payment's been sent. You can check it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Payment's been sent. You can check it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Got it. Payment confirmed. I guess we're done here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Got it. Payment confirmed. I guess we're done here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Got it. Payment confirmed. I guess we're done here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But are you sure there's a village out here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But are you sure there's a village out here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But are you sure there's a village out here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hate to say this now, but this area's considered a Corrupted Area.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hate to say this now, but this area's considered a Corrupted Area.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hate to say this now, but this area's considered a Corrupted Area.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you show up later claiming we got the place wrong and ask for a refund, don't bother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you show up later claiming we got the place wrong and ask for a refund, don't bother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you show up later claiming we got the place wrong and ask for a refund, don't bother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. It's not a mistake. It's a bit of a walk, but there's a village tucked away nearby.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. It's not a mistake. It's a bit of a walk, but there's a village tucked away nearby.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. It's not a mistake. It's a bit of a walk, but there's a village tucked away nearby.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah? Well, for the price you paid, I'll take your word for it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah? Well, for the price you paid, I'll take your word for it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah? Well, for the price you paid, I'll take your word for it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That place is my hometown.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That place is my hometown.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That place is my hometown.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As familiar scenery came into view, a forgotten scent of flowers brushed past my nose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As familiar scenery came into view, a forgotten scent of flowers brushed past my nose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As familiar scenery came into view, a forgotten scent of flowers brushed past my nose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the shadow of a towering tree blurred the view of a tiny village shimmering in the distance...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the shadow of a towering tree blurred the view of a tiny village shimmering in the distance...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the shadow of a towering tree blurred the view of a tiny village shimmering in the distance...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I saw the image of my younger self curled up, lost, and alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I saw the image of my younger self curled up, lost, and alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I saw the image of my younger self curled up, lost, and alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A wanderer with no place to return to has no concept of home.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A wanderer with no place to return to has no concept of home.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A wanderer with no place to return to has no concept of home.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But <color=#ffd34c>we</color> called this place our sanctuary...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But <color=#ffd34c>we</color> called this place our sanctuary...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But <color=#ffd34c>we</color> called this place our sanctuary...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because all our beginnings started here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because all our beginnings started here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because all our beginnings started here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's been a theft in the village?
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's been a theft in the village?
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's been a theft in the village?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. A brother and sister from outside apparently took corn from the fields.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. A brother and sister from outside apparently took corn from the fields.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. A brother and sister from outside apparently took corn from the fields.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Things have been tense lately, so even something small like this has the villagers riled up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Things have been tense lately, so even something small like this has the villagers riled up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Things have been tense lately, so even something small like this has the villagers riled up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. This area's too close to the Corrupted Area for children to wander in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. This area's too close to the Corrupted Area for children to wander in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. This area's too close to the Corrupted Area for children to wander in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure it wasn't a wild animal?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure it wasn't a wild animal?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure it wasn't a wild animal?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's what I thought at first, but the boy admitted it himself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's what I thought at first, but the boy admitted it himself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's what I thought at first, but the boy admitted it himself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The girl ran off, but... this area isn't exactly safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The girl ran off, but... this area isn't exactly safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The girl ran off, but... this area isn't exactly safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you have time, Professor, I'd be grateful if you helped find her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you have time, Professor, I'd be grateful if you helped find her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you have time, Professor, I'd be grateful if you helped find her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hard to believe, honestly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hard to believe, honestly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hard to believe, honestly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But understood, Chief.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But understood, Chief.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But understood, Chief.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even after hearing it, I still had my doubts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even after hearing it, I still had my doubts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even after hearing it, I still had my doubts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But here she is. A corn thief, in a place like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But here she is. A corn thief, in a place like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But here she is. A corn thief, in a place like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: E-eeek!
root.m_Talk_DEU: E-eeek!
root.m_Talk_FRA: E-eeek!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before I address the crime, let me say two things.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before I address the crime, let me say two things.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before I address the crime, let me say two things.

root.m_Talk_ENG: First, that's not a chair. Please stand up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: First, that's not a chair. Please stand up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: First, that's not a chair. Please stand up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And second, what are you doing here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And second, what are you doing here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And second, what are you doing here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone told me this was a good spot to sit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone told me this was a good spot to sit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone told me this was a good spot to sit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were waiting for sundown, weren't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were waiting for sundown, weren't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were waiting for sundown, weren't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It'd be easier to sneak around the village after dark.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It'd be easier to sneak around the village after dark.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It'd be easier to sneak around the village after dark.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't mean anything bad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't mean anything bad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't mean anything bad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was just... scared to go back to the village.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was just... scared to go back to the village.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was just... scared to go back to the village.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. At least you understand what you did was wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. At least you understand what you did was wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. At least you understand what you did was wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You should go back and apologize. Whatever your reasons, stealing is wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You should go back and apologize. Whatever your reasons, stealing is wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You should go back and apologize. Whatever your reasons, stealing is wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the bad ones.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the bad ones.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the bad ones.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I said you're the bad ones. You didn't care how desperate we were.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I said you're the bad ones. You didn't care how desperate we were.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I said you're the bad ones. You didn't care how desperate we were.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All we wanted was to stay in the village a few days. We said we didn't even mind sleeping on the ground.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All we wanted was to stay in the village a few days. We said we didn't even mind sleeping on the ground.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All we wanted was to stay in the village a few days. We said we didn't even mind sleeping on the ground.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you said we smelled. You threw rocks at us. You cursed at us. That's why we stole.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you said we smelled. You threw rocks at us. You cursed at us. That's why we stole.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you said we smelled. You threw rocks at us. You cursed at us. That's why we stole.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Three ears of corn?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Three ears of corn?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Three ears of corn?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Two were for my brother and me. The third... was for compensation. My bruise still hasn't gone down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Two were for my brother and me. The third... was for compensation. My bruise still hasn't gone down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Two were for my brother and me. The third... was for compensation. My bruise still hasn't gone down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard your brother came to apologize.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard your brother came to apologize.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard your brother came to apologize.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then why didn't you go with him?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then why didn't you go with him?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then why didn't you go with him?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I apologize, it means he did something wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I apologize, it means he did something wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I apologize, it means he did something wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But he didn't. He always suffers because I'm a burden.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But he didn't. He always suffers because I'm a burden.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But he didn't. He always suffers because I'm a burden.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe you didn't do anything seriously wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe you didn't do anything seriously wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe you didn't do anything seriously wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But lowering your head isn't shameful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But lowering your head isn't shameful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But lowering your head isn't shameful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It means you can accept your flaws, and it shows you care about others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It means you can accept your flaws, and it shows you care about others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It means you can accept your flaws, and it shows you care about others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So what changes if I do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So what changes if I do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So what changes if I do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you apologize, I'll make sure you get a meal better than three ears of corn.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you apologize, I'll make sure you get a meal better than three ears of corn.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you apologize, I'll make sure you get a meal better than three ears of corn.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How's that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How's that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How's that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Fine. I'll apologize.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Fine. I'll apologize.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Fine. I'll apologize.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wise choice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wise choice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wise choice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then come with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then come with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then come with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-now that I think about it, maybe not...
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-now that I think about it, maybe not...
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-now that I think about it, maybe not...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The longer you delay hard words, the heavier they become.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The longer you delay hard words, the heavier they become.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The longer you delay hard words, the heavier they become.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to blow this up over three ears of corn, I won't stop you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to blow this up over three ears of corn, I won't stop you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to blow this up over three ears of corn, I won't stop you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm sorry. I was wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm sorry. I was wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm sorry. I was wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. Since the child admits it, perhaps we should let it go?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. Since the child admits it, perhaps we should let it go?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. Since the child admits it, perhaps we should let it go?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just a moment, Chief. This isn't something an apology can fix.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just a moment, Chief. This isn't something an apology can fix.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just a moment, Chief. This isn't something an apology can fix.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Corrupted Area has been expanding for years. We're short on food and housing as it is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Corrupted Area has been expanding for years. We're short on food and housing as it is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Corrupted Area has been expanding for years. We're short on food and housing as it is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to Professor Birmingham, the village is safe, but we can't take chances on outsiders.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to Professor Birmingham, the village is safe, but we can't take chances on outsiders.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to Professor Birmingham, the village is safe, but we can't take chances on outsiders.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I agree. It's unfortunate, but we can't make exceptions to village rules.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I agree. It's unfortunate, but we can't make exceptions to village rules.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I agree. It's unfortunate, but we can't make exceptions to village rules.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They don't even have a guardian who can vouch for them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They don't even have a guardian who can vouch for them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They don't even have a guardian who can vouch for them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are rumors of C.O.s in human form. We can't let sympathy cloud our judgment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are rumors of C.O.s in human form. We can't let sympathy cloud our judgment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are rumors of C.O.s in human form. We can't let sympathy cloud our judgment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-we're not C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-we're not C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-we're not C.O.s.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My brother and I aren't C.O.s...
root.m_Talk_DEU: My brother and I aren't C.O.s...
root.m_Talk_FRA: My brother and I aren't C.O.s...

root.m_Talk_ENG: May I speak, Chief?
root.m_Talk_DEU: May I speak, Chief?
root.m_Talk_FRA: May I speak, Chief?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Professor Birmingham?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Professor Birmingham?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Professor Birmingham?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If no one objects, I'll take responsibility for this child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If no one objects, I'll take responsibility for this child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If no one objects, I'll take responsibility for this child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You, Professor?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You, Professor?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You, Professor?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I'll take full responsibility if anything happens.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I'll take full responsibility if anything happens.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I'll take full responsibility if anything happens.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I'll also make sure nothing does.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I'll also make sure nothing does.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I'll also make sure nothing does.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... What does everyone else think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... What does everyone else think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... What does everyone else think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the professor says so, maybe they're not so dangerous?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the professor says so, maybe they're not so dangerous?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the professor says so, maybe they're not so dangerous?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. He wouldn't say this lightly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. He wouldn't say this lightly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. He wouldn't say this lightly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-still, even the professor can't prove who these kids are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-still, even the professor can't prove who these kids are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-still, even the professor can't prove who these kids are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We don't know what they've been through...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We don't know what they've been through...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We don't know what they've been through...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The boy admitted his wrongdoing, and the girl came back for his sake.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The boy admitted his wrongdoing, and the girl came back for his sake.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The boy admitted his wrongdoing, and the girl came back for his sake.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're just cornered by life. But their hearts are in the right place. You have nothing to fear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're just cornered by life. But their hearts are in the right place. You have nothing to fear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're just cornered by life. But their hearts are in the right place. You have nothing to fear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. If the Professor's vouching, I won't object.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. If the Professor's vouching, I won't object.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. If the Professor's vouching, I won't object.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Then it's settled. Now
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Then it's settled. Now
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Then it's settled. Now
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. Not yet, Chief.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. Not yet, Chief.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. Not yet, Chief.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We haven't heard the child's own answer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We haven't heard the child's own answer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We haven't heard the child's own answer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? M-me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? M-me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? M-me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, this hand I'm offering may feel like hope.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, this hand I'm offering may feel like hope.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, this hand I'm offering may feel like hope.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But let me be clear. If you come with me, you'll face pain in the future.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But let me be clear. If you come with me, you'll face pain in the future.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But let me be clear. If you come with me, you'll face pain in the future.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, will you take it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, will you take it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, will you take it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's fine. I've already been through plenty of bad things.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-it's fine. I've already been through plenty of bad things.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's fine. I've already been through plenty of bad things.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... I'll trust you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... I'll trust you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... I'll trust you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then come with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then come with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then come with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um, mister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um, mister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um, mister.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you a good person?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you a good person?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you a good person?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we're judging good and evil, I'm probably closer to evil.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we're judging good and evil, I'm probably closer to evil.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we're judging good and evil, I'm probably closer to evil.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then why are you helping me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then why are you helping me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then why are you helping me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're planning to sell me as a slave, I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're planning to sell me as a slave, I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're planning to sell me as a slave, I'm sorry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't read, and I'm not smart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't read, and I'm not smart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't read, and I'm not smart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about that. You'll be educated by the Order.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about that. You'll be educated by the Order.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about that. You'll be educated by the Order.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Order?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Order?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Order?

root.m_Talk_ENG: An institution I've worked with for a long time. There, you'll...
root.m_Talk_DEU: An institution I've worked with for a long time. There, you'll...
root.m_Talk_FRA: An institution I've worked with for a long time. There, you'll...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Esther!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Esther!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Esther!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Brother!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Brother!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Brother!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you so much. Chief told me everything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you so much. Chief told me everything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you so much. Chief told me everything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know how to repay this kindness...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know how to repay this kindness...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know how to repay this kindness...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey. The man said we can join the Order!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey. The man said we can join the Order!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey. The man said we can join the Order!

root.m_Talk_ENG: He said we'll get to learn to read too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: He said we'll get to learn to read too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: He said we'll get to learn to read too!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Order? Isn't that only for people with family names?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Order? Isn't that only for people with family names?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Order? Isn't that only for people with family names?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're just nameless commoners...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're just nameless commoners...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're just nameless commoners...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Indeed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Indeed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Indeed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But perhaps this too... is fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But perhaps this too... is fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But perhaps this too... is fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about that. Under my sponsorship, you'll be granted a new family name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about that. Under my sponsorship, you'll be granted a new family name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about that. Under my sponsorship, you'll be granted a new family name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll take your name?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll take your name?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll take your name?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not the rightful heir to House Birmingham, so that's not possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not the rightful heir to House Birmingham, so that's not possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not the rightful heir to House Birmingham, so that's not possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This will be a new house. A symbol that you two belong to the same family.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This will be a new house. A symbol that you two belong to the same family.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This will be a new house. A symbol that you two belong to the same family.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Its name... yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Its name... yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Its name... yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let it be <color=#ffd34c>Chevalier</color>. A name that means honorable knight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let it be <color=#ffd34c>Chevalier</color>. A name that means honorable knight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let it be <color=#ffd34c>Chevalier</color>. A name that means honorable knight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I'd never come back after Sir Allen's death.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I'd never come back after Sir Allen's death.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I'd never come back after Sir Allen's death.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... I ended up here again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... I ended up here again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... I ended up here again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm home, everyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm home, everyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm home, everyone.
